$50M lost as Infini suspects rogue developer of theft, retained admin rights post-project delivery. USDC stolen.
news.summary: The main suspect in the theft of $50 million in USDC from a crypto payments company is a developer who reportedly maintained administrative privileges even after completing the project.

news.headline: In April 2025, Trifork Group AG announces a change to their Board of Directors.
Bitcoin faces potential $90,000 support retest with traders cautious about price-range lows. Market conditions favor bears at monthly close.
news.summary: Concerns are rising among Bitcoin traders as the price of BTC hovers around lows, signaling market inertia favoring bearish trends leading up to the monthly close. Traders fear a potential return to a price-range low, sparking unease in the cryptocurrency market.

Kremlin: We see the US is trying to figure out the root cause, we hope this will help towards a settlement.
Sunlands Technology integrates DeepSeek AI model, enhancing adult education. Aims to innovate key areas, strengthen market position.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Sunlands Technology Group (NYSE: STG) revealed the integration of DeepSeek, an advanced artificial intelligence model, into its operations. Sunlands, a prominent player in both China's adult online education and adult personal interest learning sectors, sees this integration as a pivotal moment in its technological evolution within adult education. DeepSeek's impressive reasoning abilities and effective learning mechanisms will be harnessed by Sunlands to foster innovation, enhance core business functions, and streamline processes across critical areas like teaching, research, customer acquisition, and operational management. This move is aimed at solidifying Sunlands' position as a leader in its industry.

news.headline: Kremlin: Putin is to make an international phone call this morning as part of 'informing partners about talks with the US.'
Oil minister: Iraq is waiting for Turkey's approval to restart oil flow and Kurdish oil exports will hopefully be ready in two days
Heitman buys majority stake in Swedish self-storage firm Servistore with 31 sites & 4,000 units, spanning 330,000 sq ft.
news.summary: In London, the global real estate investment management firm Heitman LLC has revealed its acquisition of a controlling stake in Servistore, the third largest self-storage operator in Sweden. Servistore boasts 31 sites located in 14 different cities, with 25 sites currently operational and an additional 6 sites set to open soon. The business manages over 4,000 units, offering a total of 330,000 square feet of storage space. This strategic investment, carried out on behalf of Heitman’s European value strategy, reinforces the firm's commitment to ongoing growth and investment opportunities in the region.

news.headline: Significant ownership stakes reported for company, amounting to a substantial proportion of total shares.
Alibaba to invest $53 billion in AI, shifting focus.

Vantage Foundation partners with National Burn Hospital in Hanoi to offer support to patients.- Key points: Partnership with National Burn Hospital in Hanoi- Date: Feb. 24, 2025- Location: Hanoi, Vietnam- Mention of the National Burn Hospital Le Huu Trac, a leading medical facility specializing in burn treatments and rehabilitation.
news.summary: In Hanoi, Vietnam, on February 24, 2025, Vantage Foundation revealed its collaboration with the National Burn Hospital Le Huu Trac. This medical facility in Hanoi is renowned for its expertise in burn treatments and rehabilitation. The partnership aims to offer aid and financial help to all patients affiliated with the hospital.

news.headline: SOPHiA GENETICS partners with global institutions for liquid biopsy testing, revolutionizing oncology. #AI #Healthcare
news.summary: SOPHiA GENETICS, a leader in data-driven medicine using AI technology, has facilitated the introduction of high-quality oncology testing by various institutions globally. The company, with headquarters in Boston, MA and Rolle, Switzerland, revealed this development on Feb. 24, 2025. SOPHiA GENETICS, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SOPH, continues to expand its reach and impact in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: euNetworks appoints Richard Gulson as Chief Revenue Officer to lead go-to-market strategy.
news.summary: A recent announcement from euNetworks reveals that Richard Gulson has been appointed as the Chief Revenue Officer. In this role, he will oversee all aspects of the company's go-to-market strategy. This appointment signifies a significant move for euNetworks as they aim to strengthen their revenue-generating capabilities under Richard's leadership.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs in US experience $1.14B outflows in 2 weeks due to US-China trade tensions, record since launch.
news.summary: Bitcoin ETFs in the United States experienced significant outflows totaling $1.14 billion within a two-week period, marking the largest outflow since their inception. This downward trend was influenced by apprehensions surrounding trade tensions and monetary policy, which negatively impacted investor confidence.

news.headline: Alm. Brand A/S released its weekly share buybacks report. #stocks #investing
International Petroleum Corp repurchased 218,956 common shares from Feb 17-21, 2025.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, International Petroleum Corporation (IPC) shared that they had repurchased 218,956 of their common shares (ISIN: CA46016U1084) between February 17 and 21, 2025. This transaction was made under IPC's normal course issuer bid/share repurchase program. IPC is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker symbol IPCO. This move signifies the Corporation's confidence in its own stock and strategic financial management.

ARCH Medical Solutions Corp. acquires KISS Technologies, LLC in Owings Mills, Maryland, a provider of prosthetic suspension systems.
news.summary: ARCH Medical Solutions Corp. ("ARCH") has successfully acquired KISS Technologies, LLC ("KISS") based in Owings Mills, Maryland. KISS specializes in cutting-edge prosthetic suspension systems, renowned for enhancing patient mobility. This strategic acquisition bolsters ARCH's portfolio and brings forth KISS's expertise in the field.

news.headline: Destination Asia is offering White Lotus-themed travel experiences in Thailand, inspired by the show's opulence and spirituality.
news.summary: Destination Asia DMC has introduced a fresh array of travel experiences inspired by the third season of The White Lotus, which spotlights Thailand. The collection encapsulates the essence of the show, featuring a mix of luxury, spirituality, and adventure. The company aims to provide travelers with a unique insight into the country's charm through tailored experiences.

news.headline: New book showcases the inspiring life of Congresswoman Cardiss Collins, serving as a role model for young people.
news.summary: Mill City Press recently released a compelling biography showcasing the remarkable life of Congresswoman Cardiss Collins. Co-authored by Jasmin N. Dobson and Frank E. Dobson, Jr., this book aims to inspire young readers with the story of "A Leader With Courage: The Impact Of Congresswoman Cardiss." The book was launched in Beavercreek, Ohio, on February 24, 2025. Through this publication, the authors shed light on the influential journey of Congresswoman Collins, exemplifying the importance of courageous leadership.

news.headline: DrLightfoot777's book offers hope for overcoming addiction, promoting a flourishing life. Published by Xulon Press on Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: Xulon Press is offering a source of hope for individuals struggling with addiction, providing guidance towards a better life. Recently in Los Angeles on February 24, 2025, Author DrLightfoot777 shared his personal journey along with his professional knowledge to motivate readers through the book "More Than..." This work aims to provide encouragement and support for those seeking deliverance from addiction and invites them to embrace a life of growth and fulfillment.

news.headline: Author William E. Chandler delves into spiritual warfare and overcoming irrational fears in his book The Haunting: Spiritual Warfare.
news.summary: Xulon Press introduces a candid examination of the roots of our anxieties in Tucson, Arizona, on February 24, 2025. Renowned author William E. Chandler delves into the origins of irrational fears and disturbances in his latest book, titled "The Haunting: Spiritual Warfare." Priced at $17.99 for the paperback edition with ISBN 9798868508806, and $8.99 for other formats, Chandler uncovers the factors that contribute to the loss of peace and joy in individuals' lives.

news.headline: Xulon Press compares biblical teachings to Alcoholics Anonymous in A Parallel Of Words ($38.99) by DrLightfoot777.
news.summary: DrLightfoot777, author, compares biblical teachings to the "Big Book" of Alcoholics Anonymous in a book titled A Parallel Of Words, priced at $38.99. Published by Xulon Press, the comparison aims to highlight the similarities in recovery teachings. The book was presented in Los Angeles on February 24, 2025. This comparison offers readers the opportunity to explore truth in recovery from different sources.

news.headline: Estonia's grain terminal in Mäo using Penetron concrete waterproofing for silos completed in 2024 for moisture protection.
news.summary: In October 2024, the initial stage of constructing the grain terminal for Kevili Farmers' Cooperative in Mäo, Estonia was finished. The project utilized PENETRON ADMIX, a waterproofing admixture, to maintain the impermeability of the concrete silos to moisture and water. This step ensures the preservation of the stored goods.

news.headline: Industrial Scientific is opening a Center of Excellence in Dammam, Saudi Arabia for applications support, training, consultations, and future manufacturing.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, on February 24, 2025, the establishment will host dedicated centers for application assistance, education, and individualized guidance. It is set to evolve into a production plant. Industrial Scientific, a prominent player in comprehensive gas solutions, will spearhead this initiative.

news.headline: CustomerGauge launches Geographical NPS View tool offering real-time global customer insights. Boston, Feb. 24, 2025 /PRNewswire-PRWeb.
news.summary: A recently launched Geographic NPS View tool offers B2B companies a dynamic, live portrayal of their Account Experience (AX) results worldwide, facilitating improved customer understanding and interaction. The tool was introduced in Boston on Feb. 24, 2025. This innovation comes from CustomerGauge, a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Iraqi Oil Minister: Oil exports from the Kurdish region will resume in a week.
Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov: Russia welcomes Trump's position on no NATO for Ukraine.
Hacker from Bybit breach holds 437,700 ETH ($1.2B) surpassing Vitalik Buterin's holdings, 0.36% of total ETH supply.
news.summary: The individual behind the largest cryptocurrency theft in history now possesses more Ethereum than Vitalik Buterin, the creator of the blockchain. The North Korean Lazarus Group reportedly stole over $1.4 billion in ETH by taking control of Bybit exchange's cold wallet. Arkham Intelligence, a blockchain analytics company, revealed that the hacker's wallet contained 437,700 ETH, valued at $1.2 billion currently, representing 0.36% of Ethereum's total supply. Significant moves have been observed from the hacker's wallet. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Earnings report on Feb 24, 2025: 18 companies reporting before bell, including Domino's Pizza - $4.95 EPS on $1.48B revenue. 9 companies reporting after bell, such as Ultra Clean Hldgs - $0.44 EPS on $559.19M revenue.
news.summary: Several companies are set to report their quarterly earnings before and after the bell. Before the bell, notable mentions include Domino's Pizza expecting earnings of $4.95/share on revenue of $1.48 billion, while Clear Channel Outdoor anticipates earnings of $0.03/share on revenue of $645.84 million. After the bell, Ultra Clean Holdings is estimated to report earnings of $0.44/share on revenue of $559.19 million, with Goosehead Insurance expected to report earnings of $0.40/share on revenue of $78.20 million. Notably, Beyond is likely to report a loss of $0.75/share on revenue of $331.06 million.

news.headline: Bitcoin faces $90,000 support retest. Traders fear BTC price dip. Bears control market into monthly close. #Bitcoin #crypto
news.summary: Bitcoin traders are feeling concerned about the possibility of the cryptocurrency returning to its previous price range lows. The market's lack of momentum is allowing bears to retain control as the month comes to a close. This has led to increased anxiety among traders as they track the movements of Bitcoin, which currently sits at around $40,000. The uncertainty surrounding the market has caused many traders to fear a potential downward trend in the coming days.

news.headline: Berachain surpasses $3.2B TVL, becoming 6th largest DeFi network by overtaking Arbitrum and Base in value locked.
news.summary: Berachain, a layer-1 blockchain, has seen a significant increase in total value locked, reaching a noteworthy $3.26 billion. This surge has propelled Berachain to surpass Arbitrum and Base, positioning it as the sixth-largest decentralized finance (DeFi) network in terms of total value locked.

news.headline: Samsung and union settle on 5.1% wage increase by 2025, easing tensions.
Citigroup boosts Indian stocks rating to overweight, downgrades Asean region.

news.summary: On February 24, 2025, announcement number 17/2025 was released to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S.

news.headline: Billionaire Steve Cohen warns of 'significant correction' due to Trump's tariffs, immigration crackdown, and spending cuts.
news.summary: Chairman and CEO of Point72 Asset Management, billionaire investor Steve Cohen, has recently expressed a bearish outlook on U.S. markets due to concerns over trade policies, immigration restrictions, and federal spending cuts. This marks the first time in recent memory that Cohen has taken a negative stance on the market. Speaking at the FII Priority Summit in Miami Beach, Cohen warned about the inflationary impact and reduced consumer spending that could result from President Donald Trump's tariff policies, emphasizing that tariffs essentially act as a tax. He also highlighted the potential constraint on labor force growth with reduced immigration compared to the past five years. These warnings from Cohen come at a time when market indicators suggest increasing vulnerability, with the S&P 500 being closely monitored for any potential impact.

news.headline: Company completes share buy-back program, financial transactions involved.
Pentagon & DOJ advise employees to continue jobs, ignoring Musk's request for justification.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by 5.6% this year, surpassing the initial forecast of 4.5%. The growth is primarily driven by strong rebounds in major economies such as the United States and China. Additionally, global trade is projected to increase by 7.2%, marking a significant improvement from the previous estimate of 4.8%. This positive development is largely attributed to the successful vaccination campaigns and substantial fiscal support provided by governments around the world. Despite these optimistic projections, there are concerns about rising inflation rates and supply chain disruptions that could potentially hinder the economic recovery.

news.headline: Early redemptions reported to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S on February 24, 2025, as per Announcement no. 16/2025.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S released Announcement no. 16/2025.

news.headline: Share buyback program in week 8 on Nasdaq Copenhagen, LSE, Euronext Dublin; oversight by Danish FSA and other stakeholders.
news.summary: Major stock exchanges including Nasdaq Copenhagen, London Stock Exchange, and Euronext Dublin, along with the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority and other stakeholders, are involved in discussions regarding new regulations. The proposed changes aim to enhance transparency and compliance within the financial sector. This collaboration is crucial as it impacts a significant portion of the market, with participants from various sectors representing billions in assets under management. The cooperation between these entities is essential for fostering a robust and secure financial environment.
